title: Hieracium onosmopsis
intro: Hieracium onosmifolium, commonly known as Hieracium onosmopsis, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome and gastritis. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium onosmopsis include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. In herbal medicine, Hieracium onosmopsis is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is used to support digestive health and immune function.
